title: SRM University Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: SRM University Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
SRM University Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SRM University Holdings Services:
SRM University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University Holdings Services!
